title: Migrate legacy DAX services to new clusters
description: We need to get SODA and metaserv and maybe image serve running in the new clusters. Now that we've agreed to new namespaces, I also need to fix that. There are also unused PVs in places that need to be cleaned up.

title: Tiapp: surface errors/warnings in Overview Editor to Problem view and as project file decorators
description: Steps to Reproduce: 1. Create a new project from tiDev 2. Import the project to tiStudio 3. open tiapp.xml Actual: there are errors that the user need to resolve, but they do not see that indication until file is open Expected: To indicate to the user that there is an error on the project when they import

title: CLI: ti clean should remove/empty Resources for Alloy projects
description: h4. Problem Description — With the Alloy compiler trying to become smarter in compiling only those files that are changed, it happens more often that for different reasons the Resources directory is not up-to-date anymore. For this reason I'd like to see the Resources folder emptied or removed with ti clean and the Studio options using this CLI command. This way I can instruct people to do a clean as a first attempt to resolve compile/build problems.
